examples: These can get caught on objects and strangulate the child.
Asphyxiate lasts 5 SEC. There was a typo in the Blizzcon presentation. Asphyxiate is the same duration as Strangulate, which it replaces.
"It will be very difficult to find the balance between regulate and strangulate, " says David Downey, chief executive officer of equity-futures exchange OneChicago.
